query: The desktop app opens, but I am not sure the local Vibooks API is actually listening yet. Walk me through the safe startup and first-token path.
Given these receipts and a credit-card statement, record them in Vibooks, keep the card as a liability, and reconcile to the statement.
I want to replace an old messy Vibooks book with a clean rebuild under the same company without hard-deleting posted history.
Before month-end close in Vibooks, tell me the exact verification and report checks I should run so bank and card balances tie.
Create a Vibooks onboarding plan for a Canadian small business and use ASPE-style defaults unless I clearly need IFRS.
I am opening a Vibooks book for a U.S. retailer. Keep jurisdiction and industry separate, and stop before configuring sales tax if the state is unknown.
Use Vibooks for a business in an uncovered country. If the local tax rules are not in the skill yet, look up official sources before you create tax codes.
Make this landing page look more premium and improve the CTA.
Write a shell script that backs up a SQLite database every hour.
Help me reconcile this spreadsheet manually; I am not using Vibooks.
Parse these PDF invoices and export the line items into Excel.
Explain how U.S. sales tax works in general. I am not using Vibooks.
